message:
fix(server): bound HTTP supervisor retries and add startup readiness probe (issue #60)

Root cause: respawn_http_server_instance_with_retry looped indefinitely
on failures, keeping the process alive with a launchd-visible PID but
never binding the port. Operators saw state=running with nothing listening.

Fixes:
1. HTTP_SUPERVISOR_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_RESTART_FAILURES = 10: exits non-zero
   after ~30s of consecutive spawn failures so launchd surfaces the error
2. startup_readiness_self_probe(): probes /healthz after bind, catches
   "bound but not serving" within 10s
3. Test: respawn_http_server_gives_up_after_max_consecutive_failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
